name: Werewolf
nightAction: Werewolves wake up and look around for other werewolves. If you are alone, you may look at a card from the center.
nightActionDetailed: When you wake up, all players who are werewolves are shown to you as werewolves. If there are other werewolves click ok to confirm you saw the others. If you woke alone, you may look at a card from the center, by clicking it.

name: Seer
nightAction: You may either look at another player's card or two of the center cards.
nightActionDetailed: You have 2 options: 1. If you click on another player's card, you will see their role. 2. If you click on a center card, you will see its role and may look at a second center card to view it, too.

name: Robber
nightAction: You may exchange your card with another player's card and then view your new card.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a card of another player you swap their card with yours. Then you look at your new role. You will not perform that role's action later.

name: Troublemaker
nightAction: You may exchange cards between two other players.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a card, you select it and it gets a brown border. If you click it again you unselct it and the border resets. Once you selected two other player's cards, those cards get swapped. You do not know the roles of the players you swapped.

name: Drunk
nightAction: You must exchange your card with one from the center.
nightActionDetailed: You have to click a card from the center. You then swap that card with your card. You do not get to look at your new role.

name: Insomniac
nightActionDetailed: When all players that do their night action before you, have done their night action, you look at your card. Your card gets automatically shown to you. You therefore know what your end role is.

name: Mason
nightAction: Wake up and look for the other Mason.
nightActionDetailed: When you wake up, all players' cards who are Masons will be shown to you. If only you wake as a Mason, then the other Mason is in the middle.
